analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e spell formatting. All required fields are present and logically populated.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear and directly references established mechanics (resistance to nonmagical damage types).

mechanics.name: Stoneskin

components.material: diamond dust worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes

mechanics.effect: Target gains resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

analysis.notes: The material component cost (100 gp) is significant and correctly noted as consumed, which balances the spell's powerful defensive effect.
